hooks.command:
cd '/Users/jamiebaldwin/7even Capital/feasibility-app' && { dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); unpushed=$(git log origin/main..HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$dirty" ] || [ -n "$unpushed" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️  WEEKEND SAFETY CHECK: Uncommitted changes or unpushed commits detected.

📝 BEFORE CLOSING:
  1. Run: git status
  2. Commit any changes: git add -A && git commit -m "message"
  3. Push to GitHub: git push origin main

Repository: DevHaavn/7even-haavn-feasability-app
Live URL: https://7even-haavn-feasability-app.vercel.app"}'; fi; }
